allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('=== Production dependencies \(bundled, not externalized\) ==='\) external = ['react', 'react-dom', 'react-router-dom', 'i18next', 'react-i18next', 'i18next-browser-languagedetector', 'i18next-http-backend', '@supabase/supabase-js', 'qrcode'] for k,v in data.get\('dependencies', {}\).items\(\): if k not in external: print\(f' {k}: {v}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); co=d.get\('compilerOptions',{}\); print\('strict:', co.get\('strict'\)\); print\('noUncheckedIndexedAccess:', co.get\('noUncheckedIndexedAccess'\)\); print\('strictNullChecks:', co.get\('strictNullChecks'\)\); print\('noImplicitAny:', co.get\('noImplicitAny'\)\); print\('skipLibCheck:', co.get\('skipLibCheck'\)\)")

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(md|txt)$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(docs/|\.claude/|locales/|CHANGELOG|README|LICENSE)'; then echo "WARNING: Creating markdown file outside docs/.claude/locales/: $FILE. Consider placing in .claude/skills/ or docs/ instead." >&2; fi; exit 0
